title: Solar Array and Power Electronics Manufacturing
entry_mechanism: European or Asian solar array manufacturer with PSAP Track establishment in Riyadh Smart Parcel
executive_summary:
Satellite solar arrays and power conditioning electronics are critical sub-systems that determine a satellite's power budget and operational lifetime. Saudi Arabia's solar energy expertise — NEOM, ACWA Power, and the world's largest solar installation programme — creates an unusual and underexploited synergy with space solar array manufacturing. The processes used in high-efficiency GaAs solar cell assembly and PCU electronics manufacturing are technically distinct from terrestrial solar but share fundamental photovoltaic principles.

The global space solar array market was valued at $2.1 billion in 2024. Saudi Arabia's SSA satellite programme creates immediate domestic demand for space-grade solar arrays. A Saudi-manufactured solar array on a Saudi satellite — powered by Saudi-refined silicon and assembled by Saudi engineers — is a compelling Vision 2030 narrative with genuine industrial substance.

Saudi Arabia's solar irradiance advantage (among the highest in the world) also creates a natural testing environment for space solar array ground validation — a competitive advantage for a Saudi space solar array manufacturer serving the regional and global market.

companies.name: Azur Space Solar Power
companies.rationale: Azur Space is Europe's leading GaAs space solar cell manufacturer. Non-ITAR German technology with active international sales.

companies.name: Spectrolab (Boeing)
companies.rationale: Spectrolab produces the highest-efficiency space solar cells. ITAR restrictions apply but licensed manufacturing for Saudi solar array assembly is potentially negotiable.

companies.name: Thales Alenia Space
companies.rationale: Thales Alenia integrates solar arrays on satellites. Saudi array integration work package.

companies.name: Airbus Space Power
companies.rationale: Airbus designs solar arrays and PCUs for its satellite platforms. Saudi manufacturing JV under SSA programme.
companies.contact: Airbus Defence and Space VP Electrical Power Systems

companies.name: CESI (Italian space solar)
companies.rationale: CESI produces GaAs solar cells for space and has international licensing partnerships.

partners.name: SSA / Riyadh Smart Parcel
partners.upgrade: Azur Space or CESI JV; GaAs cell assembly facility; PCU electronics manufacturing; ECSS space qualification process; 15 Saudi power electronics engineers
partners.timeline: 36 months to first qualified solar array

partners.name: ACWA Power / Solar Division
partners.current: Large-scale terrestrial solar installation; PV manufacturing knowledge
partners.upgrade: Transfer PV process knowledge to space-grade application; shared testing infrastructure; ACWA-SSA dual-use solar research programme

partners.name: KACST Energy Research Institute
partners.current: Solar energy research; photovoltaic materials research
partners.upgrade: Space-grade solar cell research programme; GaAs cell efficiency research; GADD-KACST space solar programme

partners.name: KFUPM Electrical Engineering
partners.upgrade: Space power systems engineering specialisation; satellite PCU design programme; industrial placement at Saudi solar array facility
